results.title: A 10x better benchmark for AI browser agents - Web Bench | Product Hunt
results.content: agents. Have been working on an agentic product and, until now, have just been testing it using whatever wild task I dream up on any given day. Huge eval hole with web agents so this work is really appreciated. Love how you can see the agent runs broken down on Skyvern by task. That's great and it achieves more coverage for testing of web agents. Web agents can bring real value for automation in these domains. Also I find playwright-mcp quite stable when being used with appropriate MCP client [...] Title: A 10x better benchmark for AI browser agents - Web Bench | Product Hunt [...] A 10x better benchmark for AI browser agents - Web Bench | Product Hunt
